ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the publication was produced */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the abstract of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES publication_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the author is affiliated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Researcher ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type (e.g., thesis, journal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abstracts" (
  "abstract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abstract */,
  "abstract_text" TEXT /* Text of the abstract */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abstract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., DOI, URL, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, student, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the publication */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_versions_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_tags" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the institution where the publication was produced
